reasoning: This is essentially a duplicate of PRED-SR-SUPPRESS with cryptographic registration (hash 54939640, registered 2026-04-04). Same claim: Schumann resonance drops >30% during next G3 magnetic storm. All the same concerns apply: (1) reversal of previously falsified W027/PRED-R006 which claimed enhancement, (2) published literature more commonly reports amplitude enhancement during geomagnetic storms, (3) open-ended test window. The crypto hash adds registration integrity but does not address the prediction-reversal issue or the conflict with observational literature on storm-Schumann coupling.
